# [Clang] Crash (SIGSEGV) in template argument deduction involving nested generic lambdas and local classes

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/152689

## Body

**_Generated by fuzzer._**
Repro: https://godbolt.org/z/Pn8PeMo7b
Clang trunk (and versions since 13.0) crashes with a segmentation fault (exit code 139) when compiling following code using `-std=c++20`. 

## Program
```cpp
template <class F = decltype([]<auto G =
                                    [] {
                                        class Base {
                                            virtual void update() {}
                                        };
                                    }>() {})>
void f(F op = {}) {
    op();
}

int main() { f(); }
```

### Comment 2 - frederick-vs-ja
